message:
fix(copilot): bump FAD rev to include workspacePath in legacy history [ah2x6]

Bump franken-agent-detection to rev 248455b which adds workspacePath
extraction in parse_cli_session_json for legacy history JSON files.
Add regression assertion in connector_copilot tests pinning workspace
field from legacy_history_human.json fixture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
